name: Lumentum Holdings Inc.
description: Lumentum Holdings Inc. is a leading designer and manufacturer of innovative optical and photonic products that enable advanced communications and commercial laser applications. The company provides a wide range of solutions for cloud networking, data center connectivity, 3D sensing, and industrial laser manufacturing. With over 45 years of expertise in photonics and a robust portfolio of more than 1,600 patents, Lumentum leverages vertically integrated manufacturing to deliver high-quality, reliable technology. Headquartered in the United States, the company serves global markets by driving the development of next-generation infrastructure for AI data centers, telecommunications, and advanced industrial systems.
